name: Aatrox
description: Aatrox has awakened, and the world shall bear witness to his wrath. Mortals tremble, for he is the end that comes for them, an indomitable force that will bring their feeble existence to its knees. In the face of Aatrox, resistance is futile, and the path to oblivion awaits those who dare to stand against him.
creator: Dom_Sallow
